strengths: Strong Power BI and dashboard development
Proficient SQL and ETL pipeline experience
Quantified impact on KPIs and efficiency
weaknesses: No mention of UAC Portal familiarity
improvement_bullets: Analyzed organizational performance by drafting and reviewing operational policies, ensuring data-driven compliance and alignment with non-profit service delivery standards.
Managed an internal tracking system for service metrics and incident database records, utilizing SQL and Excel to maintain 100% data accuracy and support program evaluation.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate complex performance metrics into actionable reports, mirroring the rigor required for program evaluation and quality assurance initiatives.
Leveraged experience in data extraction and predictive modeling to identify service trends, directly contributing to the continuous improvement of program quality and efficacy.
Fluent in English and Spanish, with the ability to communicate technical data insights to diverse stakeholder groups, including immigrant families and program leadership.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, HeartShare Human Services of New York, 12 MetroTech Center, Brooklyn, NY. Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Bilingual Program Analyst (English / Spanish) opportunity with HeartShare. I am interested in this opportunity because of HeartShare’s century-long commitment to empowering children and families in NYC, and my personal drive to use data as a tool for social good. What interests me about working for HeartShare is its holistic approach to improving the lives of individuals with developmental disabilities and families in need; this mission inspires me because I believe that data-driven insights are essential to ensuring that vulnerable populations receive the highest quality of care. I believe my background in quantitative analysis and my experience in cross-functional stakeholder collaboration would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw, complex data into clear, actionable operational strategies. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client onboarding; I developed automated workflows and data-driven dashboards to monitor these processes. As a result, I reduced processing time by 40% and reallocated resources toward high-impact community outreach efforts. Ultimately, I know that the Bilingual Program Analyst (English / Spanish) role at HeartShare would allow me to bring my expertise in Power BI and SQL to improve program quality and predictive capabilities. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my policy review and operational documentation skills. I spearheaded the creation of SOPs that standardized service delivery and reduced new hire training time by 50%. This background in documentation and process improvement directly supports your need for consistent policy review and incident tracking. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my bilingual communication skills in working on program evaluation and reporting at HeartShare. I know that my analytical precision and commitment to data-driven decision-making align with what it takes to succeed at the Bilingual Program Analyst (English / Spanish) role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
